filesModified.purpose: Added sm:flex-wrap to address items container; added sm:w-[calc(50%-1rem)] to each address item div
Mirrored TSX: added sm:flex-wrap to address items container; added sm:w-[calc(50%-1rem)] to each address item div
Changed social link hover color from hover:text-blue to hover:text-accent
Mirrored TSX: changed social link hover color from hover:text-blue to hover:text-accent

warnings: Pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in unrelated blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs)

syncStatus.notes: All four files updated in sync. Pre-existing false-positive warning on root wrapper mismatch (InspectorControls fragment vs section) is the standard pattern for all blocks in the theme.

fixesApplied.description: Address items container: flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-8 → flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:flex-wrap gap-8 in both TSX and PHP
Address item div: added sm:w-[calc(50%-1rem)] class in both TSX and PHP to constrain each address to half-width (two per row)
Social link anchor: hover:text-blue → hover:text-accent in both TSX and PHP
